mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(amount), 2), 0) AS avgAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_type = 'DEPOSIT' THEN amount END), 0) AS depositAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_type = 'WITHDRAW' THEN amount END), 0) AS withdrawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_type = 'TRANSFER' THEN amount END), 0) AS transferAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_type = 'PAYMENT' THEN amount END), 0) AS paymentAmount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days}*2 DAY) AND trans_time < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 'SUCCESS') AS prevPeriodAmount FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 'SUCCESS'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(trans_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(amount), 2), 0) AS avgAmount FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(trans_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT channel AS name, COUNT(*) AS value, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY channel ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT HOUR(trans_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY HOUR(trans_time) ORDER BY MIN(trans_time)

SELECT t.*, c.name AS customerName FROM trans_log t LEFT JOIN customer c ON t.customer_no = c.customer_no WHERE t.amount >= #{minAmount} AND t.trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND t.status = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY t.amount DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT trans_type AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY trans_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCustomers, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeCustomers, SUM(CASE WHEN customer_level IN ('PLATINUM') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vipCustomers, ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE())), 0) AS avgAge, COUNT(DISTINCT branch_id) AS branchCoverage FROM customer
SELECT customer_level AS name, COUNT(*) AS value, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM customer GROUP BY customer_level ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(open_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS newCustomers FROM customer WHERE open_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(open_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE()) < 25 THEN '25岁以下' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 25 AND 34 THEN '25-34岁' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 35 AND 44 THEN '35-44岁' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 45 AND 54 THEN '45-54岁' ELSE '55岁以上' END AS ageGroup, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM customer WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ageGroup ORDER BY MIN(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE()))

SELECT b.region AS name, COUNT(c.id) AS value, ROUND(COUNT(c.id) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(c.id)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM customer c LEFT JOIN branch b ON c.branch_id = b.id WHERE c.branch_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY b.region ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalLoans, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('NORMAL','OVERDUE') THEN maturity_total ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalBalance, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' THEN amount END), 0) AS overdueAmount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(interest_rate), 2), 0) AS avgRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(term_months), 0), 0) AS avgTerm FROM loan_record
SELECT status AS name, COUNT(*) AS value, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM loan_record GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(loan_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount FROM loan_record WHERE loan_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(loan_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT CONCAT(term_months, '个月') AS term, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct FROM loan_record GROUP BY term_months ORDER BY term_months

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(loan_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' THEN maturity_total END), 0) AS overdueAmount, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS overdueRate FROM loan_record WHERE loan_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(loan_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT p.product_name AS name, p.product_type AS type, COALESCE(SUM(ps.amount), 0) AS saleAmount, COUNT(ps.id) AS saleCount, DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(ps.amount), 0) DESC) AS rnk FROM product p LEFT JOIN prod_sale ps ON p.product_code = ps.product_no GROUP BY p.id, p.product_name, p.product_type ORDER BY saleAmount DESC

SELECT p.product_type AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS productCount, COALESCE(SUM(ps.amount), 0) AS saleAmount, COUNT(ps.id) AS saleCount, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ps.amount), 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(ps.amount)) OVER(), 0), 1) AS pct FROM product p LEFT JOIN prod_sale ps ON p.product_code = ps.product_no GROUP BY p.product_type ORDER BY saleAmount DESC

SELECT product_name AS name, expected_return AS returnRate, product_type, risk_level, RANK() OVER(ORDER BY expected_return DESC) AS rnk FROM product WHERE status = 'SELLING' ORDER BY expected_return DESC
